overall.description: A first-person perspective video game sequence depicting a player exploring a dark rural property at night with a flashlight. The player moves from a narrow exterior passage between a wooden fence and brick house, around to the back entrance, and enters a dilapidated interior room with a large hole in the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden fence and brick house wall

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the narrow passage between the wooden fence and the brick house wall, sweeping the flashlight across the surfaces

entered.detail: single-story red brick house with white window frames and overgrown ivy
weathered vertical wooden fence boards running parallel to the house
simple wooden gate structure at the front of the passage
tall dry grass and weeds growing along the dirt path
tall wooden utility pole with power lines silhouetted against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a narrow dirt passage between a weathered wooden fence on the left and a red brick house on the right. The flashlight illuminates the rough textures of the brick wall and overgrown vegetation, with a utility pole visible in the distance against the dark overcast night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: back yard patio area with bench and rear entrance

events.description: rounding the corner of the house to reveal the back patio area with a wooden bench and the open rear doorway

agents.ego_description: continuing around the side of the house toward the rear entrance, flashlight sweeping across the windows and back patio concrete surface

entered.detail: simple wooden plank bench sitting on the concrete patio area
dark open doorway leading into the house interior with steps leading up to it

segments.scene_description: Moving around the corner to the back of the house, the scene opens into a small concrete patio area. A wooden bench sits to the left while the open rear doorway becomes visible ahead. The wooden fence recedes into the background as the player approaches the dark entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dilapidated interior room with damaged wall

events.description: crossing the threshold from the exterior into the dark interior of the abandoned house
entering the pitch-black interior where only the flashlight illuminates the space, revealing a large breach in the far wall

agents.ego_description: stepping through the doorway into the abandoned house, sweeping the flashlight around the dark interior to reveal debris and structural damage

entered.detail: dark empty room with brick walls, debris scattered on the floor, and damaged structure
large irregular hole in the far wall revealing the night sky and trees outside
tall vertical metal ventilation pipe running from floor to ceiling
wooden box or crate sitting on the floor near the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters the dark interior of the house, transitioning from the cool outdoor night to a pitch-black room illuminated only by the flashlight. The space reveals a dilapidated interior with a large hole in the far wall, a metal ventilation pipe, and scattered debris on the concrete floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cramped outdoor alleyway into the decaying interior of a dark house. It begins by navigating a narrow dirt passage, where a flashlight cuts through the night to reveal a weathered wooden fence and the rough texture of a red brick wall. As the camera rounds the corner, the space opens into a small concrete patio featuring a wooden bench before drawing closer to an open rear doorway. The scene then shifts from the cool outdoor air into a pitch-black room, where the beam of light exposes a dilapidated interior. Finally, the movement reveals a concrete floor strewn with debris, a metal ventilation pipe, and a large hole gaping in the far wall.
